subcodes.first_line: O beloved of God! All your letters were received and perused, yet their contents were the cause of sorrow [3.5s]... ...I swear by the Ancient Beauty! So great is My sorrow and regret that My pen is paralyzed between My fingers
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی مکاتیب شما کل واصل و جمیع ملاحظه گردید ولی مضامین کل سبب تاسف و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for protection, @suffering and imprisonment
